calendar.matters:
NAME CHANGE CALENDAR
Off Calendar Oct-20-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Name Change of Minor.
Dept. 514, Judge: Charles Crompton, Clerk: A. Mok and M. Grier. Case not called on the record. Proceedings not reported.

Petitioner, mother Phuong Hong Le, of minor present in court.
Petitioners sworn.
Proof of Publication on file.
Order granting dispense with notice to other parent granted on file.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and the petition should be granted.

The court grants the petition for Change of Name of minor from current name Quan Minh Le to new name Bryan Quan Le.

The court grants the petition for Change of Name of minor from current name My Hong Le to new name Amy Hong Le.

Decree Changing Name signed by the court.

AMENDED ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Sep-22-2015 Reset To Oct-20-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514 For Order To Show Cause

AMENDED ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jan-06-2015 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Oct-10-2014 Amended
